medical_records_request.subject: Medical Records Request — {{patientName}} (DOB {{patientDob}})  [Ref: {{refToken}}]
medical_records_request.html:
Dear {{doctorOfficeName}} team,

I am writing on behalf of patient {{patientName}} (Date of Birth: {{patientDob}}) to formally request copies of the following medical records:

{{requestedDocuments}}

This request is in connection with case reference {{caseReference}}. Please reply to this email with the records as PDF attachments. Reply directly to this thread so the request stays linked to [Ref: {{refToken}}].

For any questions, please contact {{replyTo}}.

Thank you for your time.

Best regards,
{{senderName}}
